sections.heading: Vocational Education and Training Funding Act 1992
sections.title: Amendment of Vocational Education and Training Funding Act 1992
sections.summary: This section amends the Australian National Training Authority Act 1992 by altering membership requirements and definitions within the Australian National Training Authority (ANTA) Agreement. It specifies changes to the number of members, the structure of the agreement, and the procedures for presenting and publishing the agreement to Parliament. The amendments aim to update the ANTA Agreement to replace the 2001-2003 version with a new agreement framework effective from 2004.

requirements.text: Omit '4 members', substitute '5 members' in subsections 36(3) and (5)
Repeal the definition of Agreement, substitute a new definition
Insert subsection 18A: Present agreement to Parliament within 15 sitting days
Insert subsection 18B: Publish agreement on website within 15 sitting days
Savings provisions for Ministerial Council actions and decisions
Repeal subsection 9AB(3), substitute new definition of applicable ANTA agreement

sections.source_quote: Australian National Training Authority Amendment Act 2003, 2003
